description: Labeled routing benchmark for the demo skill catalog (manifests/demo-skills.json). Each item pairs a subtask with the skill a human would assign. Used by scripts/benchmark.py to measure routing accuracy.

subtasks.task: Read the pdf and extract the requirements
Verify the UI in the browser with playwright
Write unit tests for the new implementation
Prepare the mission spec and verification plan
Ship the release once checks pass
Extract the tables from the document
Run the ui checks in the browser
Extract the mission spec from the pdf
Debug the failing implementation shown in the browser
Parse the invoice file and pull the key figures
Check the web page renders correctly
Confirm the build is ready to cut a release
Fix the bugfix regression and add tests
